title: Mikaniopsis vitalba
intro: Mikaniopsis vitalba, also known as Vitalba, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in relieving pain and preventing infections. The bioactive constituents of Mikaniopsis vitalba include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Vitalba is typically used to prepare teas, infusions, and extracts, and is often found in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine, particularly in the treatment of fever and digestive issues.
taxonomy: Mikaniopsis vitalba is classified within the family Asteraceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family.
